content.en:
The second floor of the Ultimate Tower.

Ye Tian was still comprehending the stone tablet here, improving his ultimate rules, and after a long time, several of his ultimate rules had skyrocketed.

this day.

The second Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lord came to the second layer.

Seeing the arrival of this person, Ye Tian immediately went to break into the tower to see how difficult it was to enter the third layer.

Another Ultimate Void, this time without an opponent.

As soon as he entered, he saw countless projections, all of which were of himself, and he seemed to be trapped here, unable to get out of here no matter what.

"If you give up, you can give up silently in your heart, and you can return to the second floor of the Ultimate Tower. "

A voice rang out.

Ye Tian didn't choose to give up, he wanted to know what the mystery of this level was.

Time passed slowly, I don't know how many years have passed, Ye Tian is still trapped here.

It was as if endless years had passed.

Suddenly, one day, Ye Tian came to his senses.

"Ultimate Will!"

This level has something to do with the will, this is not a projection, but an illusion, an illusion of the 600 extreme will, if you want to break the illusion, you must start from the ultimate will.

Maybe elevating the ultimate will to the ultimate will can break here, or it may not be broken.

"No matter how strong the ultimate will is, but now it is still unable to concentrate the power of the will, if it is like the ultimate arcane, the power instinct of the ultimate will is exerted, and the power is perfectly concentrated, so as to break out a terrifying blow, maybe this illusion can be torn apart. "

Ye Tian followed this method to do it, to study, to comprehend.

......

"Wanfa Jizun is very smart, he thought of the trick so quickly!" said Doom Jizun with a smile while sipping tea.

The Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable was still here with the Doomsday Extreme Venerable, and said, "The Doomsday Extreme Venerable, you didn't reveal the information to the Ten Thousand Law Supreme Venerable, did you?"

"How could I do that? Let them grow step by step from the Ultimate Tower, so that they can hope to become the Ultimate Extremity. Besides, we Ultimate Supreme bets that there is no need to engage in such a small action. Doomsday Supreme said.

"Yes!"

Shadow Sand Jizun said the same thing.

But he had to admit that Ye Tian was too demonic, the youngest, but his understanding was terrifying, and he discovered the problem very quickly, and he really had great hope of becoming the ultimate supreme.

Every assessment of the Ultimate Tower didn't seem to have much impact on cultivation, but it was to guide an Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord to a higher realm step by step, and solve the problems that affected the impact on the Ultimate Extreme Venerable.

This is also the method that these Ultimate Masters have researched, and the fact that these Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters can enter the Ultimate Tower is undoubtedly the greatest opportunity in their lives.

But whether they can keep me or not is up to them.

......

After grasping the mystery of clearing the customs, Ye Tian studied the use of the ultimate will here, and tried again and again.

I don't know how many years have passed.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian's ultimate will shook this ultimate void, causing the projection to dissipate a little.

"Sure enough, this method works!"

Ye Tian only touched the ultimate arcane application of the Ultimate Will, and he successfully shook this level, making the projection dissipate, if he continued to study, he would definitely be able to break through here and go to the third layer of the Ultimate Tower.

In this way, another period of time passed, Ye Tian continued to improve, and another Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lord was also studying here, but he still couldn't figure out how to break through.

Another long time has passed.

Ye Tian's research on the Ultimate Will once again rose to a higher level, allowing Sancheng's projection to dissipate, and he was very close to truly breaking through here.

(CBDH) after that, he continued his research.

100,000 Ultimate Era!

The Ultimate Era of Millions!

Gradually, Ye Tian's research on the ultimate will continued to improve.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian opened his eyes, the ultimate will turned into a sword, and with a wave of his hand instinctively, he instantly broke through the level of the Ultimate Tower, and entered the third layer of the Ultimate Tower alone.

"I didn't expect to use this opportunity to create an ultimate arcane prototype again, and it was also the ultimate arcane in terms of will!" Ye Tian muttered.

And at this moment, he had a new understanding and perception of the Doomsday Exaltator's Ultimate Secret Method, which was of great benefit to him in refining the Ultimate Will.

Ye Tian came here and saw a mural, what surprised him was that this mural could temper his ultimate will, his ultimate will entered this mural, and he was tempered by horror, if it was combined with the secret method of the end, the effect would be very good.

Obviously, each floor of the Ultimate Tower has a corresponding reward.

"Don't rush to the fourth floor this time, first use this mural to complete the seventh transformation of the ultimate will!"

Ye Tian said.

So, with the help of the murals here, he continued to refine the ultimate will, and the ultimate will gradually became stronger.

Time flies, a long time has passed, and the other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords still haven't come to this layer, obviously they are all trapped in the first or second layer, and he is already far ahead of them.

So, naturally, he was not in a hurry.

Anyway, there are so many benefits here, so why rush to climb to the next level.

Millions of Ultimate Era After.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's ultimate will has finally completed the seventh transformation under the tempering of the mural, and if he completes the eighth and ninth transformations, he can break through to the ultimate will.

"The murals here should allow me to complete my eighth transformation, so continue to cultivate here!"

Ye Tian was not in a hurry, it was the other ten Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters who were in a hurry.

After that, another incomparably long period of ultimate chance passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Ultimate Will transformed again, reaching the eighth transformation of the Ultimate Will, the Ultimate Will became extremely powerful, and his strength naturally increased a little.

And he'd perfected his ultimate arcane form once again.

He named this ultimate arcane form the Sword of Will, and with this ultimate arcane, he had more means to kill the enemy, and it was difficult for other Eternal Ultimate Realm Lords to resist.

After all, this is the ultimate arcane that directly obliterates the enemy's ultimate will, and unless you comprehend the ultimate will, you don't want to be able to withstand such an ultimate arcane killing move.
